name: atlas-insights
description: Unified insight pipeline for Atlas-X-AI: harvester hooks (PostToolUse + SessionEnd), insight-review and insight-enhance skills, and a federated shade-insights-rag MCP server. One corpus on archie today, Pinecone-ready. Drop-in for hermes, archie, and any future client host.
author: anombyte / Atlas AI

ATLAS_INSIGHTS_CORPUS_HOST.description: Hostname (or Tailnet alias) of the corpus host running moll-e + shade-insights-rag

ATLAS_INSIGHTS_ENDPOINT.description: moll-e write endpoint. Defaults to archie's Tailnet IP. On the corpus host itself, override to http://127.0.0.1:3100/insight/store for localhost.

ATLAS_INSIGHTS_HOST_TAG.description: Tag applied to ingested rows so cross-host insights are distinguishable in the corpus.
